subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. It served as a glorious proof of the unity and oneness of the friends of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید دلیل جلیل بر اتحاد و یگانگی یاران الهی بود این
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
